content.text: All core checks pass. Let me run the remaining checks — standby, banners, CHG triggers, health state, agent status, and the alert files.

arguments.command: cd /Users/ainchorsoc2a/.openclaw/workspace && for f in state/standby-mode.json state/system-banner.json state/agent-status.json state/health-state.json state/chg-triggers.json state/task-verification-alert.json state/dod-validation-alert.json state/cron-dead-letter-alert.json state/pending-model-reset.json state/aria-crest-alert.json state/cron-health-alert.json state/session-model-drift-alert.json; do echo "=== $f ==="; cat "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo "(not found)"; done
